ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the business operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., 1-10 employees) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the business */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the business is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_company_size FOREIGN KEY ("company_size") REFERENCES company_sizes ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user in their organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the rating belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., total, ease, feature, support, value, recommend) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES review_categories ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company size */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Capterra) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., total, ease, feature, support, value, recommend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_businesses" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role within the business */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has within the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_businesses_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the review at the time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES review_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the vote is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vote is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user casting the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tag_associations" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business offering the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "can_read_reviews" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can read reviews */,
  "can_write_reviews" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can write reviews */,
  "can_approve_reviews" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can approve reviews */,
  "can_delete_reviews" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can delete reviews */,
  "can_export_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can export data */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can generate reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
